sourcesContent:
import { Box, Container, Divider, Grid, Paper, Typography } from '@material-ui/core'
import React from 'react'

function StudentActivity() {
    return (
        <Box>
            <Container>
                <Grid container>
                    <Grid item>
                    <Paper elevation={0} >
                    <Typography variant='h4' >
                        Activity
                    </Typography>
                    <Divider />
                    
                    <Typography variant='h4' >
                        Activity
                    </Typography>
                </Paper>
                    </Grid>

                </Grid>
               
            </Container>
        </Box>
    )
}

export default StudentActivity
